targets.queryText: SELECT tier_number AS tier, tier_name AS name, ROUND(months_to_goal, 0) AS months, DATE(estimated_goal_date) AS goal_date, UPPER(confidence) AS confidence, ROUND(assumption_monthly_contribution, 0) AS contribution, assumption_drip_enabled AS drip, ROUND(assumption_annual_appreciation_pct, 1) AS appreciation FROM goal_tiers ORDER BY tier_number;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tier_number AS tier, tier_name AS name, ROUND(months_to_goal, 0) AS months, DATE(estimated_goal_date) AS goal_date, UPPER(confidence) AS confidence, ROUND(assumption_monthly_contribution, 0) AS contribution, assumption_drip_enabled AS drip, ROUND(assumption_annual_appreciation_pct, 1) AS appreciation FROM goal_tiers ORDER BY tier_number;
